search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk dizziness vertigo adult referral recommendations
candidate_sources_rejected: older BPPV summaries without opened key statements
rejection_reasons: Patient pages are not clinician guidance.
Unopened summaries were not used for item-level mapping.
Teaching pages are not an exact workflow guideline.
population_applicability: Partial: exact for dizziness assessment in DHA telehealth; not exact for every BPPV, vestibular-neuritis, cardiac, or neurological diagnosis.
setting_applicability: Direct for DHA-licensed telehealth and partial for in-person vestibular examination.
UAE_applicability: Verified for DHA-licensed telehealth in Dubai, United Arab Emirates; diagnosis-specific or in-person manoeuvres require clinician review.
recency_verification: The current DHA Issue 2 document, due for revision 2029-02-21, remained registered and was rechecked for this workflow on 2026-07-12.
superseded_check: No newer official DHA dizziness issue was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Reviewed to establish Dubai telehealth scope; no content items were mapped from scope alone.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines Dubai telehealth dizziness scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped clinician-assessed neurological, ear, positional, nystagmus, gait, balance, hearing, and vital-sign fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Emphasises structured history and available examination to distinguish dizziness syndromes.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped cardiac, neurological, syncope, severe-headache, weakness, and persistent-vomiting warning fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped dizziness descriptors, episode timing, positional context, associated symptoms, and prior episodes.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped clinician-selected vital, neurological, ear, ECG, and glucose documentation fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: States that tests depend on history and examination and should be documented only when clinically deemed necessary.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped return and escalation documentation only when discussed or arranged by the clinician.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Identifies emergency and specialist referral features for dizziness.

unresolved_source_gaps: BPPV, vestibular neuritis, formal positional manoeuvres, mastoid or oropharyngeal examination, vestibular rehabilitation, fall-prevention content, and fixed one-to-two-week timing remain unsupported.
The BPPV or vestibular diagnosis label remains clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
